references.title: Relationship between student profile, tool use, participation, and academic performance with the use of Augmented Reality technology for visualized architecture models

annotations.text: Authors use augmented reality to assist visualize 3D models in an architecture course. Collaborative behaviors with this system seem to improve student outcomes. Authors perform an experiment where they test the students, do an Augmented Reality Experiment and then are tested again.
Results show that use of mobile devices correlates with Motivation and Success. Authors also discuss challenges with implementation and content generation.
